Plaintiffs are ordered to respond on or before May 31, 2007. The court finds that the failure to respond fully was a misuse of the discovery process. Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Continued To May-22-07 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mattaniah Eytan, Esq., 415-399-1000 for defendants and moving parties Salvio Street LLC, Lucky United Properties Investments, Inc. and Chin Shih
Sam Walker, Esq, 925-917-8304 for plaintiff and opposing party Eric Lien

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT SALVIO STREET LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant acquired the property free and clear of plaintiff's claims by virtue of CCP 405.61. In any event, res judicata bars relitigation of plaintiff's quiet title and partition claims already adjudicated in favor of defendants predecessor in interest. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mattaniah Eytan, Esq., 415-399-1000 for defendants and moving parties Salvio Street LLC, Lucky United Properties Investments, Inc. and Chin Shih
Sam Walker, Esq, 925-917-8304 for plaintiff and opposing party Eric Lien

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANTS LUCKY UNITED PROPERTIES INVESTMENTS, INC. and CHIN SHIH'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Res judicata bars relitigation of quiet title and partition claims against defendants. In any event, defendants no longer have a claim to any interest in the subject real property so quiet title and partition claims cannot proceed against them. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Motion To Reconsider Decision To Overrrule Demurrer
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SALVIO STREET, LLC'S Motion For Reconsideration of Decision To Overrrule Demurrer IS DENIED. ALVAREZ DOES NOT DECIDE THE ISSUE PRESENTED HERE. IT DEALT WITH AN ISSUE CONCERNING CLASS CERTIFICATION, WHICH IT RECOGNIZED AS PRESENTING DIFFERENT ISSUES UNDER COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL THAN DENIAL ON THE MERITS, AND IT APPROVED JUDICIAL NOTICE OF AN UNPUBLISHED OPINION IN CONNECTION WITH THAT DEMURRER BUT WITHOUT DISCLOSING WHETHER THE EXISTENCE OF THE CASE ITSELF HAD BEEN PLEADED. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order. (301/PJB/pm) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
